meta.note: RSG v11 expansion — 72 companies / 10 categories. 40-F live data pending Rogers/Telus/BCE CIK resolution.

companies.name: AMC Networks
companies.strategy_note: Most stressed; cord-cutting hammering; AMC+ subscale; licensing key revenue

companies.name: Paramount
companies.strategy_note: Skydance merger; streaming losses narrowing; Pluto TV ad pivot

companies.name: WBD
companies.strategy_note: High leverage post-merger; Max growing but linear declining fast; debt restructure risk

companies.name: Disney
companies.strategy_note: DTC inflecting; parks + content + ESPN bundle thesis; ESPN streaming critical for FY25

companies.name: Comcast
companies.strategy_note: Broadband + NBCUniversal + Peacock; peacock still unprofitable; cable sub bleed accelerating

companies.name: Netflix
companies.strategy_note: Profitable streaming leader; ad tier scaling; password-sharing enforcement driving subs

companies.name: Fox
companies.strategy_note: Linear-first play; Tubi growing; Fox News dominance; low debt vs peers

companies.name: Alphabet
companies.strategy_note: Search + YouTube dual ad engine; YouTube TV growing; AI spending escalation

companies.name: Meta
companies.strategy_note: Social ad leader; Reels monetizing; AI infra spend; metaverse still burning

companies.name: Trade Desk
companies.strategy_note: Programmatic CTV leader; Kokai AI platform; OpenPath direct publisher deals

companies.name: Spotify
companies.strategy_note: Approaching profitability; podcast pivot back to music; ARPU growing

companies.name: Roku
companies.strategy_note: OS platform monetization; OneView DSP; ad rev per hour growing

companies.name: Charter
companies.strategy_note: Broadband stable; cable sub bleed; streaming aggregation; heavy debt from cable plant

companies.name: NFL
companies.strategy_note: Peak rights value; Sunday Ticket to YouTube; private entity; valuation ~$130B enterprise

companies.name: ByteDance
companies.strategy_note: TikTok ban risk in US; global short-form video dominance; ~$300B private valuation

companies.name: OpenAI
companies.strategy_note: Private; ChatGPT revenue growing fast; media licensing deals (AP, News Corp); $300B valuation

companies.name: Fubo TV
companies.strategy_note: Sports-first vMVPD; Disney/Hulu merger pending; subscriber growth but deep losses

companies.name: DISH Network
companies.strategy_note: Merging with DirecTV; $22B+ debt; combined 20M subs; ad sales integration opportunity

companies.name: Altice USA
companies.strategy_note: $25B+ debt; subscriber losses accelerating; ad revenue optimization is survival play

companies.name: Frontier
companies.strategy_note: Pure fiber post-bankruptcy; Verizon acquisition pending $20B; content bundle intelligence

companies.name: Liberty Global
companies.strategy_note: European cable; Virgin Media O2 JV; divesting assets; infrastructure focus

companies.name: Vodafone
companies.strategy_note: European MVPD pivot to pure connectivity; Germany consolidation

companies.name: Rogers
companies.strategy_note: Largest Canadian MVPD post-Shaw; Sportsnet rights management critical

companies.name: Telus
companies.strategy_note: Telus TV MVPD; competing post-Shaw; health + tech diversification

companies.name: BCE / Bell Media
companies.strategy_note: Bell Canada + CTV broadcaster + Crave streaming; dividend under pressure

companies.name: ITV
companies.strategy_note: UK largest commercial broadcaster; ITVX growing; Fremantle studio is growth engine; linear ad decline

companies.name: Canal+
companies.strategy_note: French premium pay TV; LSE listed 2024 post-Vivendi; African + European expansion

companies.name: Corus
companies.strategy_note: Canadian cable networks restructuring; debt-heavy; ad revenue collapse; Numeris multi-currency

companies.name: BT Group
companies.strategy_note: Sold BT Sport to WBD (TNT Sports UK); pure broadband + EE mobile; content JV intel only

companies.name: Sinclair
companies.strategy_note: Largest local TV group; STIRR FAST underoptimized; regional sports debt risk

companies.name: E.W. Scripps
companies.strategy_note: ION Network post-acquisition; 60+ TV stations; ad-heavy model; high leverage

companies.name: TEGNA
companies.strategy_note: 64-station group; Premion CTV growing; political + local ad powerhouse

companies.name: TelevisaUnivision
companies.strategy_note: Univision linear + ViX SVOD/AVOD; ad pressure from English-language competition for Hispanic demos

companies.name: Nexstar
companies.strategy_note: 200+ stations post-Tribune; NewsNation investment; political ad cycle dependent
